chapters.title: Introduction to TypeScript
chapters.description: Welcome to TypeScript! Discover what it is and write your first typed program.

chapters.title: Basic Types
chapters.description: Master the fundamental building blocks: strings, numbers, booleans, and any.

chapters.title: Control Flow
chapters.description: Learn to make decisions and repeat actions using if/else, switch, and loops.

chapters.title: Functions
chapters.description: Organize your code with strongly typed parameters, returns, and arrow functions.

chapters.title: Arrays & Tuples
chapters.description: Store collections of data with typed arrays and sequence-specific tuples.

chapters.title: Objects & Interfaces
chapters.description: Shape your data with object types, optional properties, and elegant interfaces.

chapters.title: Unions & Intersections
chapters.description: Combine and narrow types for powerful, flexible data structures.

chapters.title: Classes
chapters.description: Build object-oriented blueprints with access modifiers and inheritance.

chapters.title: Generics
chapters.description: Write reusable, type-safe code using generic functions, interfaces, and classes.

chapters.title: Advanced Types & Mastery
chapters.description: Master enums, literal types, type assertions, and handy utility types.
